title: Thiruvattathurai Theerthapureeswarar Temple
tagline: Thiruvattathurai Theerthapureeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tiruvattatthurai Theerthapurisvarar Temple is a Shiva temple, located in Tiruvattatthurai (also known as Tirunelvayil Arattjurai, Tiruvaratthurai and Tiruvatturai), a village in Cu
overview.description: Tiruvattatthurai Theerthapurisvarar Temple is a Shiva temple, located in Tiruvattatthurai (also known as Tirunelvayil Arattjurai, Tiruvaratthurai and Tiruvatturai), a village in Cuddalore district, Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is revered in the seventh-century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the Nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

topPlaces.name: Avinangudi
topPlaces.description: Avinangudi is a village panchayat located in the Cuddalore district of Tamil-Nadu state, India. The latitude of Avinangudi is 11.3851707 and its longitude is 79.1606569.

topPlaces.name: Anganur
topPlaces.description: Anganur is a village in the Sannasinallur panchayat, Sendurai taluk, of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India, located 14 km from Sendurai and 8 km from Tittakudi. The river "Chinna Aaru" (small river) passes through this village.

topPlaces.name: Pennadam
topPlaces.description: Pennadam (Pen Aavu Kadam) is a panchayat town in Cuddalore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Pennadam Meikandar Temple
topPlaces.description: Pennadam Meikandar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Achuthakalappalarmedu at Pennadam in Cuddalore district, Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thiruvattathurai Theerthapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thiruvattathurai Theerthapureeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thiruvattathurai Theerthapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (86 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (85 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thiruvattathurai Theerthapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thiruvattathurai Theerthapureeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thiruvattathurai Theerthapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thiruvattathurai Theerthapureeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thiruvattathurai Theerthapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Avinangudi, Anganur, Pennadam, Pennadam Meikandar Temple, Ayanathathanur.
